config.name: cisco_fmc_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: cisco_fmc_logs-latest
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (4001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:02:17.655156

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local error_msgs = {
    invalid_input = "Invalid input record",
    missing_timestamp = "Missing required timestamp field",
    invalid_ip = "Invalid IP address format"
}

-- IP address validation helper
local function is_valid_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return false end
    local parts = {ip:match("^(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)%.(%d+)$")}
    if #parts ~= 4 then return false end
    for _, part in ipairs(parts) do
        local n = tonumber(part)
        if not n or n < 0 or n > 255 then return false end
    end
    return true
end

-- ISO8601 to epoch converter
local function iso8601_to_epoch(timestamp)
    if not timestamp then return nil end
    local pattern = "(%d+)%-(%d+)%-(%d+)T(%d+):(%d+):(%d+)"
    local y,m,d,h,min,s = timestamp:match(pattern)
    if not y then return nil end
    return os.time({year=y, month=m, day=d, hour=h, min=min, sec=s})
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, error_msgs.invalid_input
    end

    -- Initialize output with constant fields
    local output = {
        class_uid = 4001,
        class_name = "Network Activity",
        category_uid = 4, 
        category_name = "Network Activity",
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "Cisco FMC",
                vendor_name = "Cisco"
            },
            version = "1.0.0"
        }
    }

    -- Timestamp processing with validation
    if record.unmapped and record.unmapped.timestamp then
        output.time = iso8601_to_epoch(record.unmapped.timestamp)
        if not output.time then
            return nil, error_msgs.missing_timestamp
        end
    end

    -- Network endpoint processing with validation
    if record.unmapped then
        local unmapped = record.unmapped
        
        -- Source endpoint
        if unmapped.source_ip and is_valid_ip(unmapped.source_ip) then
            output.src_endpoint = {
                ip = unmapped.source_ip,
                port = tonumber(unmapped.source_port)
            }
        end

        -- Destination endpoint
        if unmapped.destination_ip and is_valid_ip(unmapped.destination_ip) then
            output.dst_endpoint = {
                ip = unmapped.destination_ip,
                port = tonumber(unmapped.destination_port)
            }
        end

        -- Traffic metrics
        output.traffic = {
            bytes_in = tonumber(unmapped.bytes_received) or 0,
            bytes_out = tonumber(unmapped.bytes_sent) or 0,
            packets_in = tonumber(unmapped.packets_received) or 0,
            packets_out = tonumber(unmapped.packets_sent) or 0
        }

        -- Connection info
        output.connection_info = {
            protocol_name = unmapped.protocol
        }

        -- Device info
        output.device = {
            name = unmapped.device_name,
            ip = unmapped.device_ip
        }

        -- Policy and rule info
        output.policy = {
            name = unmapped.policy_name
        }
        output.rule = {
            name = unmapped.rule_name
        }

        -- Event metadata
        output.uid = unmapped.event_id
        output.type_name = unmapped.event_type
        output.severity = tonumber(unmapped.severity)
        output.action = unmapped.action
        output.duration = tonumber(unmapped.duration)
    end

    -- Final validation
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    return output
end
